meta.title: TuneUniversal - Free music tools
meta.description: Tune instruments, keep tempo and transpose chords with free multilingual music tools.

hero.title: TuneUniversal
hero.description: A fast international lab for tuning, tempo practice and chord work on any device.

tool.micError: Microphone access failed. Check browser permissions and try again.
tool.micPermissionDenied: Microphone permission was denied. Open site settings next to the URL, allow microphone access and reload the page.
tool.micNotFound: No microphone was detected. Connect or enable a microphone in your system settings.
tool.micNotSupported: This browser does not expose microphone access. Try an updated Chrome, Edge or Safari browser.
tool.micNeedsSecureContext: Microphone access requires localhost or HTTPS. Open the page from localhost or an HTTPS domain.

guitar-tuner.title: Online guitar tuner
guitar-tuner.description: Use your microphone to tune standard guitar strings quickly.
howItWorks: Play one string at a time.
Adjust until the indicator says in tune.

faq.question: Does it work on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes, modern mobile browsers with microphone access are supported.

faq.question: Which tuning is included?
faq.answer: The MVP uses standard E A D G B E tuning.

bass-tuner.title: Online bass tuner
bass-tuner.description: Tune a four-string bass with real-time pitch detection.
howItWorks: Tune toward the nearest target note.

faq.question: Which strings are supported?
faq.answer: Standard E A D G bass tuning.

faq.question: Do I need an app?
faq.answer: No, it runs directly in the browser.

ukulele-tuner.title: Online ukulele tuner
ukulele-tuner.description: Tune your ukulele in standard G C E A tuning.
howItWorks: Follow the flat, sharp or in-tune feedback.

faq.question: Is re-entrant tuning supported?
faq.answer: The MVP targets standard high-G G C E A tuning.

faq.question: Is audio recorded?
faq.answer: No audio is uploaded; detection runs in the browser.

metronome.title: Online metronome
metronome.description: Practice with adjustable BPM, accents and common meters.
howItWorks: Start the pulse and follow the accented first beat.

faq.question: Can I tap tempo?
faq.answer: Yes, use the tap control to estimate a tempo.

tap-bpm.title: Tap BPM counter
tap-bpm.description: Tap along to music and calculate the average BPM.
howItWorks: Reset when starting a new song.

faq.question: How many taps are used?
faq.answer: The tool keeps recent intervals for a stable estimate.

faq.question: Can I use keyboard taps?
faq.answer: This version uses the on-screen button.

chord-transposer.title: Chord transposer
chord-transposer.description: Transpose chord progressions up or down by semitones.

faq.question: Are flats supported?
faq.answer: Yes, flat roots are normalized to sharp output.

faq.question: Which chord types work?
faq.answer: Major, minor, sharps, flats, sevenths and common suffixes are supported.
